fails_to_provide_proof_of_belgian_nation.name: fails_to_provide_proof_of_belgian_nationality
fails_to_provide_proof_of_belgian_nation.description: The person does not provide proof that the person has Belgian nationality.

is_not_union_citizen.name: is_not_union_citizen
is_not_union_citizen.description: The person is not a citizen of the Union.

not_covered_by_free_movement_law.name: not_covered_by_free_movement_law
not_covered_by_free_movement_law.description: The person is not a person covered by Community law on free movement.

present_on_territory.name: present_on_territory
present_on_territory.description: The person is present on the territory.

does_not_satisfy_entry_or_stay_condition.name: does_not_satisfy_entry_or_stay_conditions
does_not_satisfy_entry_or_stay_condition.description: The person does not satisfy, or no longer satisfies, the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

possesses_valid_travel_document.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
possesses_valid_travel_document.description: The person possesses a valid travel document.

possesses_valid_passport.name: possesses_valid_passport
possesses_valid_passport.description: The person possesses a valid passport.

possesses_valid_identity_document.name: possesses_valid_identity_document
possesses_valid_identity_document.description: The person possesses a valid identity document.

recognized_as_national_by_country_author.name: recognized_as_national_by_country_authority
recognized_as_national_by_country_author.description: The person has been recognized as a national by the national authority of the person's country.

country_authority_willing_to_issue_laiss.name: country_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
country_authority_willing_to_issue_laiss.description: The national authority of the person's country has declared willingness to issue a laissez-passer for the person.

nationality_category_minister_can_issue_.name: nationality_category_minister_can_issue_laissez_passer
nationality_category_minister_can_issue_.description: The person falls within a nationality category for which the minister can issue a laissez-passer.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

subject_to_responsible_member_state_proc.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_procedure
subject_to_responsible_member_state_proc.description: The person is subject to a procedure to determine or transfer to the member state responsible for examining an international protection request.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the person has been performed.

all_case_circumstances_considered.name: all_case_circumstances_considered
all_case_circumstances_considered.description: All circumstances specific to the person's case have been considered.

current_and_real_absconding_indications.name: current_and_real_absconding_indications
current_and_real_absconding_indications.description: There are current and real indications that the person may abscond.

no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.description: The person did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay.

late_international_protection_request.name: late_international_protection_request
late_international_protection_request.description: The person did not make an international protection request within the legal time limit.

used_false_or_misleading_information_in_.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_in_procedure
used_false_or_misleading_information_in_.description: The person used false or misleading information in a relevant procedure.

used_false_or_forged_documents_in_proced.name: used_false_or_forged_documents_in_procedure
used_false_or_forged_documents_in_proced.description: The person used false or forged documents in a relevant procedure.

used_fraud_or_unlawful_means_in_procedur.name: used_fraud_or_unlawful_means_in_procedure
used_fraud_or_unlawful_means_in_procedur.description: The person committed fraud or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

failed_to_cooperate_with_immigration_aut.name: failed_to_cooperate_with_immigration_authorities
failed_to_cooperate_with_immigration_aut.description: The person does not cooperate, or has not cooperated, with authorities responsible for enforcement or supervision of immigration rules on entry, stay, establishment, and removal.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_trans.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_transfer_refusal_or_removal_measure
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_trans.description: The person indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has failed to comply with, a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_activ.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_activ.description: The person indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has failed to comply with, an entry ban that has not been lifted or suspended.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_less_.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_less_.description: The person indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has failed to comply with, a less coercive measure intended to guarantee transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_secur.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_security_restrictive_measure
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_secur.description: The person indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has failed to comply with, a restrictive measure intended to guarantee public order or national security.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_equiv.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_equiv.description: The person indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has failed to comply with, an equivalent measure taken by another member state.

subject_to_active_entry_ban.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban
subject_to_active_entry_ban.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in the state or another member state that has not been lifted or suspended.

new_application_immediately_after_negati.name: new_application_immediately_after_negative_or_removal_decision
new_application_immediately_after_negati.description: The person submitted a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a refusal of entry, refusal of stay, termination of stay, refusal-of-entry measure, or removal measure.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_responsi.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_responsible_state_when_questioned
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_responsi.description: When questioned about the point, the person concealed having already given fingerprints in another state bound by rules on determining the state responsible for examining an international protection request, after having submitted such a request.

multiple_applications_with_negative_or_n.name: multiple_applications_with_negative_or_no_permit_outcome
multiple_applications_with_negative_or_n.description: The person submitted multiple international protection requests or residence applications in the state or other member states that led to negative decisions or did not lead to issuance of a residence permit.

concealed_prior_protection_request_in_re.name: concealed_prior_protection_request_in_responsible_state_when_questioned
concealed_prior_protection_request_in_re.description: When questioned about the point, the person concealed having previously submitted an international protection request in another state bound by rules on determining the state responsible for examining such a request.

came_for_other_purposes_than_application.name: came_for_other_purposes_than_application_purposes
came_for_other_purposes_than_application.description: The person declared, or the person's file shows, that the person came to the state for purposes other than those for which the person submitted an international protection request or residence application.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The person is subject to a fine because the person lodged a manifestly unlawful appeal before the immigration litigation council.

has_valid_identity_or_travel_document.name: has_valid_identity_or_travel_document
has_valid_identity_or_travel_document.description: The person has a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

recognized_with_laissez_passer_willingne.name: recognized_with_laissez_passer_willingness
recognized_with_laissez_passer_willingne.description: The person has been recognized as a national by the national authority of the person's country and that authority is willing to issue a laissez-passer.

subject_to_relevant_absconding_procedure.name: subject_to_relevant_absconding_procedure
subject_to_relevant_absconding_procedure.description: The person is subject to a procedure relevant for assessing risk of absconding.

objective_absconding_criterion_met.name: objective_absconding_criterion_met
objective_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one statutory objective criterion for risk of absconding is met for the person.

is_foreigner.name: is_foreigner
is_foreigner.description: The person is a foreigner for purposes of the law.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a third-country national for purposes of the law.

is_in_illegal_stay.name: is_in_illegal_stay
is_in_illegal_stay.description: The person is in illegal stay for purposes of the law.

is_identified_foreigner.name: is_identified_foreigner
is_identified_foreigner.description: The person is an identified foreigner for purposes of the law.

has_risk_of_absconding.name: has_risk_of_absconding
has_risk_of_absconding.description: The person has a legally established risk of absconding.
